evidence: TAHAL 2007 (p.21): TCE 6,457 µg/L (2005) — highest recorded concentration in zone
Ecoland 2012 (p.8): TCE 12,982 µg/L (June 2010) in נת חולון 11, highest historical peak
Ecoland 2012 (p.8): TCE 27,860 µg/L (December 2012) in נת חולון 11 — absolute historical maximum
V4 Report: persistent DNAPL signature — VC 13.84 µg/L (2024) indicates anaerobic degradation
Rehabilitation reported 2013-2020 (3 cycles of strong oxidation injection) — but 2026 measurements show TCE 5,150 µg/L in נת חולון 11, confirming residual DNAPL
TAHAL 2007 identified as #1 contamination site in Holon zone with ניקוד > 2.5
facilities.notes: Primary CVOC source in zone. DNAPL (dense non-aqueous phase liquid) — TCE/PCE as liquid — remains in aquifer despite reported remediation. Requires advanced extraction (air sparging, soil vapor extraction). V4 Report § 4.1.

facilities.name_he: סונול המלאכה — תחנת דלק ודוגמה CVOC
facilities.name_en: Sonol Malaha — Fuel Station + CVOC Contamination
facilities.type: Retail fuel station + historical solvent degreasing
evidence: V4 Report § 4.1: זוג קידוחים (מ-1 ו-ק-1) monitor נד סונול המלאכה
January 2026: TCE 2,722 µg/L (מ-1) and TCE 314 µg/L (ק-1) — both exceed DWS 7.5 µg/L by >40×
CVOC rehabilitation reported 2013-2020 (3 cycles of strong oxidation) — but measurements contradict 'complete remediation' claim
DNAPL signature: TCE persists at high concentration; PCE 8.7 µg/L (near DWS)
Pattern consistent with: (a) incomplete removal of source DNAPL in aquifer, (b) continued contribution from contaminated soil vapor zone
Fuel contamination (MTBE, benzene) separate from CVOC — indicates overlapping contamination sources
facilities.notes: Case study of remediation failure — DNAPL remains in place despite reported deep injection remediation. V4 Report § 4.1: 'סיפור השיקום שלא עבד' (The Remediation That Didn't Work). Fuel and CVOC appear to be separate sources at this location.

facilities.name_en: Egged Northern Compound — Underground Fuel Storage
facilities.type: Bus fleet depot + underground fuel storage tanks (UST)
facilities.status_2021: Active; remediation EBR® system initiated September 2024
evidence: V4 Report § 4.3: 19 monitoring boreholes in אגד מתחם, most severe fuel contamination zone in Holon
Peak concentrations (2024-2025): בנזן 4,260 µg/L (אגד אזור 1, ×850 DWS); MTBE 9,660 µg/L (אגד אזור 12, ×242 DWS)
EBR® (Electro-Fenton) system deployed September 1, 2024 — first sampling 5 months later (February 2025)
Observed trends: 11 of 13 boreholes show DECREASING trend post-EBR; אגד אזור 12 anomaly shows INCREASING MTBE
Co-contaminant TCE 0.005-0.053 mg/L detected — indicates overlapping CVOC plume from Tedirgon
MTBE/benzene ratio 1:2 to 1:7 — characteristic of gasoline leakage from underground storage
facilities.notes: Most active fuel contamination source in zone. EBR® system shows promise (11/13 decreasing); however, 5-month interval insufficient to establish efficacy. אגד אזור 12 requires investigation (INCREASING trend = potential secondary source or treatment interference). V4 Report § 4.3.

facilities.operator: Active; EBR® system deployed 2023 (Phase 1 2014, upgraded Sept 2023)
evidence: V4 Report § 4.3: Site W-2 — בנזן 0.4 µg/L (×40 DWS), no DECREASING trend
January 2026: Most boreholes (W-1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9) show DECREASING trends
W-2 critical: benzene plateau suggests residual source or treatment-resistant pocket
W-1: TBA 31 µg/L — indicates active MTBE degradation (TBA = tert-butyl alcohol = MTBE breakdown product)
Remediation history: initial 2014, upgraded to 7 treatment wells September 2023
No floating product layer detected January 2026 — improvement
facilities.remediation_status: Active EBR® Phase 2 (7 treatment wells, upgraded 2023)
facilities.notes: UST source at retail fuel station. Remediation showing results (11/9 wells decreasing) but W-2 plateau requires investigation. TBA production = positive indicator of MTBE treatment. V4 Report § 4.3.

facilities.name_he: פז סיירים — תחנת דלק בסיום שיקום
evidence: V4 Report § 4.3: Site מחוץ ל-Egged / מרכבות, located SE
SVE (Soil Vapor Extraction) completed April 2023
November 2025: All measured parameters below detection threshold
Clean closure validated November 2025
Ecoland 2009: Mentioned as fuel contamination source; now resolved
facilities.notes: Success case — SVE remediation effective for UST source. Monitored boreholes now clean. V4 Report § 4.3: 'כמעט בסיום' (nearly complete).

facilities.name_he: חברות ציפוי מתכות היסטוריות (תרשיש, אמקור פליז, סופר כרום, רימטל, המלבין)
evidence: V4 Report § 4.2: Five named companies from TAHAL 2007 (p.74) and Ecoland 2012 (p.3)
TAHAL 2007 (p.21): Historical chromium plating — Cr >20 µg/L in multiple boreholes 2000-2009
V4 Report: Chromium max 4,036 µg/L in נת חולון 26 (Feb 2023, new borehole post-2021)
נת חולון 14: Cr 165.7 µg/L with INCREASING long-term trend (13.7→332.7→165.7 µg/L over 2010-2022)
V4 Report § 4.2: Identified as 'most likely source candidates' for chromium — downstream E→W flow
Ecoland 2012: Plating waste disposal practices: improper groundwater discharge (pre-1970s regulation)
facilities.notes: Legacy contamination source. Cr VI (hexavalent chromium) mobile in groundwater. Most plating companies closed — source is residual soil/groundwater contamination. V4 Report § 4.2: 'מוקד הכרום הקריטי' (chromium critical focus).

contamination_narrative.historical_context: Holon industrial zone established 1950s with metal plating, textiles, electronics. Pre-1970s: unregulated disposal directly to soil/aquifer. Key contamination eras: (a) 1950-1980 heavy metals (Cr, Ni) from plating; (b) 1960-2000 CVOC (TCE, PCE) from degreasing; (c) 1980-present BTEX/MTBE from fuel storage. Most large facilities closed by 2000.
four_primary_foci_2022_2026: CVOC (TCE/PCE) — Central/SE zone — severity 8 — DNAPL signature — Tedirgon + Sonol sources
FUEL (Benzene/MTBE) — North zone (Egged) — severity 8 — active remediation (EBR®) since Sept 2024
CHROMIUM (Cr VI) — East/SE zone — severity 7-8 — legacy plating sources — mobile in flow direction
TCE DOWNGRADIENT — Production well risk (נק מק חולון 14) — severity 4 but regulatory significance HIGH
contamination_narrative.flow_direction: South-West (דרום-מערב) — per 2021 Report p.30-31. Absolute hydraulic gradient created by western recharge (Bat Yam area). Shallow aquifer (0-10 m): fast transport to downgradient wells. Deep aquifer (30-40 m): slower transport, DNAPL persistence.
data_gaps: Stopped monitoring: נת חולון 2 (CVOC+METALS, June 2022 → 4 years gap); נד המרכבה ק2 (FUEL, March 2021 → 5 years gap). Both showed INCREASING trends before stoppage.
New boreholes post-2021: נת חולון 21-26 — only 2 measurements each, insufficient for trend determination.
Nikel: historical high in 2009 (2 mg/L, ×40 DWS) — not in current monitoring matrix. Unclear if removed or methodology change.
PFAS not measured in Holon (unlike Raanana turbine station — July 2025 finding). Recommend screening at fuel/aviation-adjacent sites.
